subcodes.title: Words to the friends spoken in Dec. 1907
subcodes.first_line: You must be thrilled that on such a Day you have come to the Holy Land.... This is an explicit promise and clearly enunciated by the Divine Prophets. They have foretold that even outwardly, the Jews will come to the Holy Land and once more reclaim their ancient splendor.
subcodes.first_line_orig: باید بسیار مسرور باشید که در چنین روزی بارض مقدس رجوع نمودید واقعا از تدین و صفای طینت
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @rejection, opposition and persecution
